description_long: This is a stylized, chibi-style doll with a large, round head and a small body, featuring light skin, big blue eyes, and a small, slightly smiling mouth. The doll has straight, light orange hair styled in a high side ponytail, with long bangs sweeping across the forehead. It is dressed in a black top with a high collar and a red-and-black plaid skirt, paired with dark leggings and shoes. The back of the doll's shirt has red text, and the skirt's plaid pattern is clearly visible from multiple angles. The arms are extended straight out to the sides, and the legs are close together, giving the doll a static, T-pose stance. The overall appearance is cute and cartoonish, with smooth, matte surfaces and simple, bold color blocking.
description: A chibi-style doll with orange hair in a side ponytail, blue eyes, a black top, and a red plaid skirt, standing in a T-pose. The design is cute, cartoonish, and features smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large blue eyes, side ponytail, black top, and red plaid skirt, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and shape of the ponytail, the profile of the face, and the slimness of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the ponytail, the red text on the shirt, and the plaid skirt pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail's fall, facial profile, and the side of the skirt and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a black high-collar top paired with a red-and-black plaid skirt, dark leggings, and matching shoes, evoking a casual, slightly punk-inspired look reminiscent of Japanese street fashion.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral, slightly smiling expression with wide open blue eyes, raised eyebrows, and a small, curved mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Straight, light orange hair styled in a high side ponytail with long bangs sweeping across the forehead.
